summary: Week 2 validates the campaign restructure — conversions more than doubled (2 → 5) while cost per conversion dropped 57%. All 5 conversions came from the two campaigns best aligned with the landing page. We also identified and blocked spam traffic sources with new negative keywords.

metrics.label: Avg CPC
metrics.note: Down from $1.50 last week — strong for B2B

funnel.title: Ad-to-Demo Funnel
funnel.notes: All 5 conversions from Competitor Conquest (3) and Integration Intent (2) — the campaigns aligned with the CRM-focused landing page.

findings.title: Campaign Restructure Is Paying Off
findings.description: Conversions jumped from 2 to 5 while cost per conversion dropped 57% ($284.92 → $122.51). The restructure into 5 campaigns with controlled budgets is delivering exactly as planned.

findings.title: Conversions Coming from the Right Campaigns
findings.description: Competitor Conquest (3 at $60.03 each) and Integration Intent (2 at $75.65 each) are driving all conversions — the two campaigns best aligned with the CRM-focused landing page. This confirms our targeting hypothesis.

findings.title: Event Registration: High Clicks, Zero Conversions
findings.description: 154 clicks at 21.51% CTR but no demo bookings. People searching for event registration features land on a CRM integration page — a clear intent mismatch. Contained to $77/week while we evaluate a dedicated landing page.

actions.title: Search Terms Analysis for Spam Patterns
actions.description: Reviewed all search term reports to identify suspicious high-CTR queries and irrelevant traffic sources driving non-converting clicks.

actions.title: Added Negative Keywords Across All Campaigns
actions.description: Blocked 6 keyword themes — ticket sales, buy tickets, online tickets, seating chart, phone integration, phone CRM — to eliminate spam and irrelevant traffic.

actions.title: Spam Traffic Identified & Blocked
actions.description: Detected suspicious search terms (e.g., 'crm integration phone' at 89% CTR) and irrelevant queries ('online ticket sales', 'seating chart'). Added 6 negative keyword themes across all 5 campaigns to stop budget waste.

actions.title: Monitored Restructured Campaigns (Full Week)
actions.description: First full week of the 5-campaign structure validated. Budget allocation now matches priority — top 2 campaigns received 54% of spend.

nextSteps: Monitor if negative keywords reduce spam bookings and irrelevant impressions
Watch Enterprise Keywords campaign — 163 clicks at $0.88 CPC is strong volume, needs time for conversions
Evaluate whether to shift Event Registration budget ($10/day) to converting campaigns
Consider dedicated landing page for Event Registration to fix intent mismatch
Track conversion quality — confirm demo bookings are legitimate enterprise leads
